picks.analysis: FDX scores +26 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+9), reinforced by Technicals (+9). The biggest contributors are 100D SMA (+3, +13.7%), Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Earnings Surprise (+2, +25.5%). Cutting the other way: 52-Week High/Low (-1, 99% of range). Within Industrials we gave FDX a +26 and CAT a +19 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take FDX calls over CAT calls, mainly on Technicals (+9 vs +4) and Fundamentals (+9 vs +7). The suggested calls sit ~9.3% OTM with 47d to expiry, delta 0.30, mid $9.75 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

Free Cash Flow TTM ($5.1B) — positive trailing-12mo FCF

takeProfit.reason: Bank gains near $211.48 (+70.0%) — the 52-week high where prior advances have stalled. The chain prices a ±24.1% move by expiry, so take profit into strength rather than chasing an extension.

cut.reason: Reduce/exit on a close below $114.42 — losing an ~8% stop (nearest support sits too far below to be a useful exit) breaks the bullish setup that drove the call (thesis invalidated). Cut before theta compounds the loss.

reasons.technical: 52-week high at $211.48 (+70.0%) — where prior advances have stalled and supply sits. RSI would likely be stretched (70+) into this level, so sell into strength rather than chase an extension.
reasons.fundamental: Roughly prices in the next 2-3 quarters of the growth the trade is paying for — beyond it you're betting on an outlier, not the thesis.
reasons.mechanical: Into a run like this, put/call usually compresses toward ~0.5 (peak greed) — it's 0.30 now: a contrarian cue to bank the move.
reasons.narrative: Peak "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" enthusiasm — sell into the strength of the story rather than wait for it to cool.

levels.prose: Into 52-week high, where the move is largely priced in — sell into strength.
levels.proseAi: Sell into the 52-week high as the story peaks and greed compresses.

reasons.technical: round number $200.00 at $200.00 (+60.8%) — the first real overhead. Watch whether it breaks on volume or rejects.
reasons.mechanical: Confirm a break with 1.3x+ relative volume and rising call volume — a low-volume poke is a fakeout, so take the trim.

levels.watchFor: Breaks on 1.3x+ volume → ride toward $211.48 (+70.0%); stalls or RSI diverges → take the trim.
levels.proseAi: Take profits at $200 if volume confirms the break; otherwise, trim.

Current spot. No action.

reasons.technical: round number $120.00 at $120.00 (-3.5%) — the first crack below spot. Losing it on volume warns the cut is next; reduce rather than hope.
reasons.mechanical: Watch for a put-volume spike or fresh put open interest here — smart money hedging ahead of the break.

levels.watchFor: Loses it on volume → the cut at $114.42 is next; tighten up.
levels.proseAi: Reduce if $120 breaks on volume, signaling smart money hedging.

reasons.technical: A daily close below $114.42 (-8.0%) breaks the structure driving the call — the chart says the move is over. Don't hold a long call under broken support.
reasons.fundamental: A guidance cut or a macro risk-off rotation is what usually drives price here — exit, don't average down.
reasons.mechanical: A surge in put buying / put-call pushing back above ~1.25 confirms the turn.
reasons.narrative: If "AI Software & Cloud Adoption" flips against the trade, the reason for the position is gone — exit on the narrative, not the chart.

levels.prose: A close below round number $115.00 breaks the structure the trade is built on.
levels.proseAi: Cut losses if a daily close below $114.42 breaks the structure or narrative.

triggers: RSI 74 is stretched — tighten the take-profit; an overbought reading plus bearish divergence is a high-strength reversal signal.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Jul 17 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: Aggressively take profits into strength, trim on conviction breaks, and cut losses decisively if support fails.

picks.analysis: NOW scores +22 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Technicals (+8), reinforced by Narrative (+7). The biggest contributors are 100D SMA (+3, +15.1%), Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +17.5%). Cutting the other way: RSI 14 (-1, 73.6), Put/Call Ratio Extreme (-1, 0.30 P/C). Within Technology, the next-closest same-direction peer is DELL at +24 — well below NOW's +22 (NOW leads on Technicals (+8 vs +7) and Narrative (+7 vs +6)), so NOW is the cleaner calls expression. The suggested calls sit ~16.6% OTM with 47d to expiry, delta 0.31, mid $5.35 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
